$comment: Scoop manifest for StartupGroups. Submission status: NOT YET PUBLISHED. To go live, copy this file into a Scoop bucket repo (e.g. https://github.com/<owner>/scoop-startupgroups) and update url + hash per release. Scoop installs MSIX via the architecture-specific url; the architecture key matches the manifest 'arch' Scoop normalises to.
description: A Windows app launcher that organises and launches groups of programs at startup.
